user_feedback: when i click pause/esc, I don't want the game to drop in opacity with the word paused, i just want the game to freeze, can you add that for me
analysis:
- Issue identified: When the game is paused, a semi-transparent overlay and "PAUSED" text are displayed. The user wants the game to simply freeze visually without any overlay or text.
- Files affected: ui.js
- Changes needed: Remove the code responsible for drawing the semi-transparent overlay and "PAUSED" text from the `renderUI` function in `ui.js` when the game is in the "PAUSED" phase. The game logic already correctly freezes when `gameState.gamePhase` is "PAUSED".
